Parameter: Incremental delivery cost per pregnancy (integration into facility care)
Source / notes: Assumption: ~$2 incremental cost for adding one oral tablet to existing delivery care. Original QEA used $7 based on analogy to other facility-based interventions, but this overstates cost since no new patient visits are required.

Trial covered 7 LMICs including Nigeria. Discount for variation in facility quality and MMR composition.
A-PLUS: RR 1.02 (null). PregnAnZI-2: also null. No neonatal benefit.
